author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 21 integration tests covering every public API after the orphans were wired and methods added: linear regressors (LinearReg, Ridge family, Lasso family, ElasticNet family, BayesianRidge, ARD, Huber, Quantile), GLM family (GLMRegressor, Poisson, Gamma, Tweedie + GLMFamily variants), Lars family (Lars, LassoLars), OMP, RANSAC, linear classifiers (LogReg, LogRegCV, LDA, QDA, RidgeClassifier, SGDClassifier with ClassifierLoss + LearningRateSchedule), SGDRegressor with RegressorLoss, LinearSVC + LinearSVR with both LinearSVCLoss / LinearSVRLoss variants, kernel SVM family (SVC + SVR + NuSVC + NuSVR + OneClassSVM with RbfKernel + LinearKernel), IsotonicRegression, MLP (Classifier + Regressor with Activation + Solver). Imports both ClassifierScore and RegressorScore traits to exercise the blanket-impl score(). All 21 pass. Final ferrolearn-linear test count: 519 (440 unit + 21 api_proof + 5 oracle + 13 proptest + 6 sklearn_equiv + 34 doctest).
